summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WBUK AI-powered whistleblower triage platform. Backend APIs are 100% functional with excellent AI integration. Frontend mostly working with one critical dashboard issue.

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime error: Select.Item must have value prop that is not empty string
ui_bugs.details: Prevents admin dashboard from loading properly after login

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Start Confidential Chat button
AI message responses via /api/chat/message with GPT-5.2
Admin stats and case listing APIs
Chat interface loads and navigation works
User can send messages and receive AI responses
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Select component runtime error in AdminDashboard - ensure all SelectItem components have non-empty value props. The error occurs in status and priority filter dropdowns.
